description_long: This is a brown paper grocery bag with a rectangular base and straight, creased sides, typical of those used in supermarkets and local stores. The front of the bag features a printed green logo with the text 'veci flash' and a smiling character, along with the phrase 'El Mercado Vecino' beneath it. The bag is made from a single sheet of kraft paper, folded and glued to form a sturdy, open-topped receptacle. The back side is plain, showing only the natural brown color and vertical creases from manufacturing. The bag appears partially full, as indicated by its slightly bulging sides and the way the top edges are not perfectly flat. No handles are visible, and the opening is at the top, allowing for easy access to its contents.
description: A brown paper grocery bag with a green printed logo on the front, partially full and open at the top, with no visible handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green 'veci flash' logo and text, with the bag's top slightly open and sides bulging.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, creased paper structure, and partially open top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown paper surface with vertical creases and no visible branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's folded base and the open top, with the bag's structure slightly leaning.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Green 'veci flash' logo with a smiling character and 'El Mercado Vecino' text on the front.
